text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, the Tracen Academy student<n>council is
holding a holiday party for<n>the student body.

text_block_list.name: Helios and Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Happy, happy holidays! ☆ Let's get<n>this party
started!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I-i-i-it's like this whole party is apresent just for me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All the academy's top Umas crowded<n>together in
one place! Almost<n>brushing up against
me—hhhggggk! I<n>feel like the gods might smite me
for<n>simply being here and breathing the<n>same air...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Sorry for the wait, everyone!<n>Let's get
this present swap started!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take the gift you brought and shuffle<n>it in with the
rest. Afterwards, take a<n>different one for yourself!
Hope you<n>all get a good one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh! I want that one... and this<n>one... and that
one too. I want 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After nearly racking my brains to the<n>point of
failure, I settled on this one.<n>Hehe. Of course, I'll
treasure it<n>forever, no matter who it's from.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, getting a present from one of<n>my precious
Umas... It's like I'm<n>already in heaven.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention I get to do all this with<n>my mega
simp trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital couldn't be happier. At<n>last, it's time
to open the presents.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ready, everyone? We're all gonna<n>open our gifts
at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one... Open!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh, what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital tears open the<n>wrapping paper and
opens the box<n>inside to reveal...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A calculator... I got a calculator!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! Never in my wildest<n>dreams
would I—ohoohoohoooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not especially. But if it's from an Uma,<n>how could I
not be thrilled?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can use it to keep my stats straight<n>when I'm
calculating Uma fic ideas<n>before bed. I wonder
who it's from...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That would be me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Of course it would be you. A calculatoris such a Shakur gift. Thank you somuch!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think it'd go to someone who<n>joined the
academy the same time as<n>me. The odds of you
getting my gift<n>were barely over one percent...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if there's some kismet at<n>work. If that's
the case, I have<n>another present to go along with
the<n>first.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? A bonus?! Are you a<n>goddess in the
flesh? Um, may I ask<n>what it is?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh, sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's a challenge. You and me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sh-Shakur?! But... you've never<n>shown any
interest in me before...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Before being the key word. That all<n>changed after I
saw you run this year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your performance isn't affected by<n>track type...
I'm curious to see how<n>that works.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... It's wild I never noticed there<n>was
someone this interesting in my<n>own gen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you out for some partner<n>running, so
lemme collect your data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Am I dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amaterasu has finally stepped out<n>from her cave!
The whole world is<n>bathed in light!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on one second, Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital is a very valuable resource in<n>my ongoing
experiments. You can't<n>just borrow her whenever
you<n>please.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why, you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's roommate, Agnes<n>Tachyon, pokes
her head into the<n>conversation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch. Back off. This's got nothin' to<n>do with you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I refuse. Digital is mine, thank you. As<n>her
roommate, I reserve the<n>preferential rights to her
usage.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you're some kinda big<n>shot just
'cause you've known her<n>longer. She's comin'
with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what's happening?! I'm<n>sure there's
been some<n>misunderstanding!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: This is... the taboo-iest of taboos. Thetwo of them... and me caught in themiddle...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh... A gust of wind could knock me<n>over...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital seems delighted to<n>have so many
Umamusume showing<n>interest in her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's an... autograph book... And it's<n>got a bunch of
—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaa?! It has everyone'sautograph?! Omigarrrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what a gem! An heirloom!<n>No—an
indisputable national treasure!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This would go for no less than a<n>million Umapoints
at auction. How in<n>the world did such an
astounding item<n>fall into my lap?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm pleased to see you like it, Agnes<n>Digital.
Everyone prepared this gift<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: P-P-P-President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You've won over countless<n>Umamusume fans
with your eclectic<n>running style.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Consequently, our appeal is broader<n>and more
impactful than before. The<n>contribution you've
made to Tracen<n>Academy is of great weight and
merit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We initially considered giving you an<n>official
commendation, but you have<n>rather more...
idiosyncratic<n>preferences, if I recall correctly.
Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We figured you might be happier with<n>a gift of this
sort. Think of it as a<n>modest symbol of our
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-o-omg I just asdhjkhkAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Fuji and Opera O
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Doto and Urara
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Waaaah... Trainer... Trai—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAGGGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I can see... the gates of Paradise...<n>opening before
me...)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A long cry of pure joy resonates<n>through the sky
on this festive night.<n>It is the most blissful
celebration that<n>Agnes Digital has ever
experienced.
